decks.notes: The main focus of this deck is to utilize combo and reanimation strategies to control the game and overwhelm the opponent. By combining cards like Duress and Deceit to disrupt the opponent's plans, as well as utilizing powerful creatures like Superior Spider-Man and Emeritus of Ideation, the deck aims to establish board presence and push for a win. With cards like Deadly Cover-Up and Requiting Hex for removal and protection, and strategic spells like Stock Up and Doomsday Excruciator for card advantage, this deck is designed to outmaneuver the opponent and secure victory.

This deck aims to disrupt, control, and manipulate the opponent's strategy using a combination of removal spells, hand disruption, and card draw. By focusing on removing threats, disrupting their hand, and gaining card advantage, the deck aims to gain control of the game and outvalue the opponent. The deck also includes cards that provide utility and flexibility, allowing for versatile plays based on the situation. The mana base is designed to support the spells in the deck, ensuring consistency in casting spells and activating abilities.

This deck focuses on controlling the game through a combination of removal spells, card draw, and powerful late-game threats. Utilizing Izzet colors, players can leverage powerful instant and sorcery spells to control the board and outvalue their opponents. Cards like Jeskai Revelation and Combustion Technique provide card advantage and removal, while Firebending Lesson and Gran-Gran offer ways to close out the game. With a mix of efficient removal, card advantage, and powerful finishers, this deck aims to outlast opponents and win through attrition.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on flooding the board with efficient creatures and using combat tricks to overwhelm opponents quickly. The key strategy is to play aggressively, utilizing cards like Practiced Offense and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker to maximize damage output. By utilizing cards like Gene Pollinator and Surrak, Elusive Hunter to enhance the board presence, this deck aims to close out games early before opponents have a chance to respond. The mana base is designed to ensure smooth land drops and consistent access to multiple colors for optimal plays.

This Azorius Aggro deck focuses on quickly developing a board presence with efficient creatures and using a mix of control spells to disrupt the opponent's game plan. By utilizing cards like Cosmogrand Zenith and Daydream alongside aggressive threats like Momo, Friendly Flier and Sage of the Skies, the deck aims to pressure the opponent while still maintaining some form of protection with Get Lost and Seam Rip. The deck's versatility is enhanced by cards like Multiversal Passage and Floodfarm Verge, allowing for different playstyles depending on the matchup.

This deck focuses on quickly building up a board presence with efficient creatures like Badgermole Cub and Llanowar Elves, supported by cards like Nature's Rhythm and Gene Pollinator to accelerate mana production and increase creature power. Seam Rip and Brightglass Gearhulk provide removal and control options, while Spider Manifestation and Mockingbird offer additional threats. The deck aims to overwhelm opponents with a combination of early aggression and powerful late-game threats like Craterhoof Behemoth and Quantum Riddler, with Meltstrider's Resolve and Soul-Guide Lantern providing utility and disruption.

The main concept of this Izzet Control deck is to control the game through a combination of card draw, removal spells, and countermagic. The deck aims to accumulate resources and disrupt the opponent's plans while setting up powerful plays with Jeskai Revelation and Combustion Technique. It also utilizes cards like Abandon Attachments and Stock Up to maintain card advantage and outvalue the opponent. By effectively managing resources and utilizing the deck's versatile spells, the Izzet Control player can outlast their opponent and ultimately secure victory.

The key concept of this Aggro Selesnya deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of aggressive creatures and powerful combat tricks. By efficiently ramping up mana with Llanowar Elves and Practiced Offense, you can quickly bring out larger threats like Brightglass Gearhulk and Surrak, Elusive Hunter. Gene Pollinator and Ouroboroid provide additional value and resilience to your board while Seam Rip and Meltstrider's Resolve can help push through damage and clear the way for your creatures. With a mix of creatures and spells, this deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain board control throughout the game.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly overwhelm your opponent with aggressive creatures and efficient spells. By utilizing cards like Burst Lightning and Slickshot Show-Off, you can deal damage while maintaining board control. Eddymurk Crab and Flow State provide additional threats on the battlefield, while cards like Riverpyre Verge and Multiversal Passage help you fix your mana base. The deck aims to apply pressure early on and keep the opponent on the back foot until you can secure a victory.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with low-cost creatures and aggressive spells. The key strategy is to use cards like Full Bore, Wild Ride, and Stormchaser's Talent to deal damage quickly while protecting your creatures with Secret Identity and Quantum Riddler. Elusive Otter and Slickshot Show-Off provide additional threats, while Callous Sell-Sword can help close out games. The mana base allows for smooth casting of spells and creatures to maintain pressure on opponents and secure victories before they can stabilize.

The deck focuses on controlling the opponent's board and resources through a combination of removal spells, card draw, and counterspells. By establishing control over the game, the player can set up their win condition by using powerful spells like Jeskai Revelation. The deck also includes utility lands to help fix mana and generate card advantage. Overall, the strategy revolves around outlasting the opponent and gradually wearing them down before securing a victory.

The focus of this Jeskai Control deck is on card advantage and resource management through a combination of draw spells like Accumulate Wisdom and Tablet of Discovery, as well as control elements such as Confounding Riddle and Combustion Technique. The deck aims to outvalue and outlast opponents by efficiently answering threats and gaining incremental advantage over time. The mana base is designed to support the three-color strategy with a balance of dual lands and basic lands. The deck also includes powerful finishers like Jeskai Revelation to close out games once it has stabilized the board.

The deck focuses on creating a fast-paced aggressive strategy using creatures with powerful abilities to overwhelm the opponent quickly. The key idea is to maintain pressure on the opponent by constantly playing threats and using cards that support the aggressive game plan, such as Meltstrider's Resolve, Practiced Offense, and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker. The deck also utilizes combat tricks like Seam Rip and Gene Pollinator to gain advantages during battles. Overall, the goal is to establish a strong board presence and quickly defeat the opponent before they can stabilize.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive playstyle. Using a combination of efficient creatures and combat tricks, the deck aims to apply pressure early on and maintain tempo throughout the game. By utilizing cards that provide additional value or card advantage, the deck seeks to outpace the opponent and secure victory before they can stabilize. The mana base is designed to support the deck's aggressive strategy, allowing for consistent and powerful plays each turn.

This Selesnya Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with a mix of efficient creatures and combat tricks. Using mana acceleration provided by Llanowar Elves and Hushwood Verge, the deck aims to play aggressive threats like Brightglass Gearhulk and Surrak, Elusive Hunter early on. Gene Pollinator and Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker provide additional utility and evasion, while Practiced Offense and Seam Rip help push through damage and disrupt opponents. With a curve that peaks at three mana, this deck aims to establish a fast, resilient board presence and maintain pressure throughout the game.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of board wipes, removal spells, and artifact cards. By using cards like Day of Judgment and Erode, the deck aims to clear the board of threats while utilizing artifacts like Cryogen Relic and Perilous Snare to control the opponent's resources. The deck also includes cards like United Battlefront and Repurposing Bay to generate advantage and maintain board presence. Additionally, the mana base is designed to support the control strategy with a focus on white and blue sources for casting powerful spells.
